title: Add schemas for external intent and finished-work evidence
goal: Implement #506 by adding explicit schemas or schema-backed validation for planning external-intent and finished-work evidence records.
Use the schemas in reconciliation/report/summary loading paths where feasible so invalid evidence produces actionable diagnostics instead of silent misrouting.
Update structured-file inventory so evidence JSON files are no longer freeform-prohibited gaps.
non_goals: Do not make GitHub or any provider mandatory.
Do not auto-close or mutate external tracker items.
Do not preserve obsolete provider-specific shapes unless current compatibility tests prove they are still consumed.
Do not turn ignored local cache files into checked-in authoritative state.

intent.outcome: external intent and finished-work evidence records have explicit schemas or schema-backed validators, and invalid evidence is reported with actionable diagnostics
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; provider-agnostic evidence shape; local cache remains optional and advisory; keep #502 open for remaining child issues
intent.latitude: may add schema files, validator helpers, checker integration, loader diagnostics, inventory updates, and focused tests
intent.escalation: stop if acceptance requires provider-specific required fields or a broad rewrite of reconciliation storage

execution.next_step: archive this slice, close #506, refresh external evidence, then continue #508/#509 under #502

invariants: external evidence remains provider-agnostic and optional
ignored local cache remains non-authoritative and reconstructable
missing evidence remains valid offline behavior
invalid evidence should become a diagnostic, not stale-state authority

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: all machine-readable files are schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, or explicitly classified diagnostics

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: schema-backed evidence validation for planning reconciliation inputs
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #508 root contract manifests; #509 package-local classification/extraction schemas
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: schema-backed construction currently requires parallel root/bootstrap schema copies and inventory classification updates; existing #526 owns helper/scaffold follow-up
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: root CLI, planning package, structured inventory, planning-surface, doctor, proof-selected, and ruff checks passed
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: none for #506; #508/#509 continue the parent structured-file-contract lane

intent_interpretation.literal request: Continue backlog lane-by-lane while dogfooding the package and creating issues for actionable improvement signals.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: complete the next #502 child without expanding product residue or provider coupling
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: schema-backed validation for external-intent and finished-work evidence
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify invalid evidence cannot silently act as current reconciliation state

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning schemas, planning installer/checker/tests, root CLI evidence loader/tests, structured-file inventory/tests, active plan/state
execution_bounds.max changed files: about 18 unless proof reveals a narrow additional owner
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py -q; ruff and relevant checks
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: before replacing the evidence model or moving cache authority
execution_bounds.stop before touching: provider-specific adapter requirements beyond optional refresh metadata

stop_conditions.stop when: the schema would require a provider-specific field for ordinary operation
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: schema validation cannot preserve existing optional/missing evidence semantics
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: changes spill into unrelated report or lifecycle behavior
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: tests reveal historical evidence shape currently needed but incompatible with a bounded schema

context_budget.live working set: issue #506, active plan, summary, evidence loader code/tests, structured inventory
context_budget.recoverable later: historical archive references to evidence files
context_budget.externalize before shift: update this plan with chosen schema boundaries and proof
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: none unless compact commands point there
context_budget.tiny resumability note: schemas and loaders are the core; cache remains optional
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before broad CLI loader refactor or if invalid-evidence handling changes report contracts

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the bounded #506 slice with explicit evidence schema validation.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve provider-agnostic behavior, optional evidence semantics, and local-cache non-authority.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Schema field permissiveness, validator helper placement, focused tests, and inventory wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Existing validation hooks cannot report invalid evidence without changing public report semantics.

active_milestone.scope: external intent and finished-work evidence schemas, validation, diagnostics, and inventory status

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #506, refresh external evidence, then promote the next prioritized structured-file-contract slice.
open_questions_to_close: whether root CLI and planning package should share schema files or keep parallel validation wrappers
whether local cache validation belongs only in loaders or also in planning surface checks
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/planning/src packages/planning/scripts packages/planning/tests
completion_criteria: External intent evidence validates against an explicit schema or schema-backed validator.
Finished-work evidence validates against an explicit schema or schema-backed validator.
Reconcile/report/summary use validated loading where feasible.
Invalid evidence produces actionable diagnostics rather than silent misrouting.
Tests cover valid, invalid, stale, and missing evidence cases.
Structured-file inventory marks evidence JSON files schema-backed or typed-validator-backed instead of freeform-prohibited gaps.

execution_run.what happened: Added explicit JSON schemas for planning external-intent evidence and finished-work evidence, installed them in root and planning package bootstrap payloads, wired schema validation into planning loaders/checkers and root external-work-delta loading, and updated inventory/tests so evidence files are schema-backed.
execution_run.scope touched: planning schemas and bootstrap mirrors; planning installer/checker/tests; root CLI evidence loading/tests; structured-file inventory/tests; README/classification; active plan/state
execution_run.changed surfaces: .agentic-workspace/planning/schemas/planning-external-intent-evidence.schema.json; .agentic-workspace/planning/schemas/planning-finished-work-evidence.schema.json; package bootstrap copies; installer/checker/test surfaces; src/agentic_workspace/cli.py; structured_file_inventory.json
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/planning/src packages/planning/scripts packages/planning/tests; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; proof-selected commands all passed
execution_run.result for continuation: #506 complete; #502 remains open for #508/#509 structured-file contract children
execution_run.next step: archive plan and close #506 after commit

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changes stayed in evidence schemas, validation hooks, inventory/classification, focused tests, and active planning surfaces
finished_run_review.intent served: yes for #506; evidence records now have explicit schemas and invalid evidence is diagnostic
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact startup/summary/report/proof/reconcile/skills surfaces, root_cli_authority defaults for direct CLI edits, and closeout_trust workflow evidence
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; schema keeps provider fields optional and preserves missing-evidence offline behavior
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: continue #508/#509 under #502 rather than expanding this slice

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: proof --changed selected workspace_cli, planning_package, planning_surfaces, cli_authority, and contract_tooling lanes; each selected command was run successfully

intent_satisfaction.original intent: #506: add schemas for external intent and finished-work evidence, with actionable invalid evidence diagnostics.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #506 delivered schema-backed validation for external-intent and finished-work evidence, invalid-evidence diagnostics, checker coverage, inventory classification, and proof-selected tests.
intent_satisfaction.unsolved intent passed to: #508/#509 remain open under #502 for remaining structured-file contract work.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: prefer explicit schema validation over larger prose guidance or provider-specific behavior
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this reduce machine-readable ambiguity without adding first-contact burden?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: Bounded #506 is complete; parent #502 remains open for remaining structured-file contract children.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Proof-selected workspace_cli, planning_package, planning_surfaces, cli_authority, and contract_tooling commands passed, including root CLI tests, planning package tests, structured inventory checks, planning surface checks, doctor, and ruff.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #506 if external-intent or finished-work evidence can again be malformed without a schema diagnostic, or if evidence schema payloads stop installing.

durable_residue.learned constraint: planning evidence schemas must stay provider-agnostic, optional for offline operation, and diagnostic rather than authoritative when invalid
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: schema-backed evidence makes reconciliation and closeout trust cheaper without making agents read raw evidence by default
durable_residue.canonical owner now: contracts/checks: planning evidence schemas, planning loaders, structured-file inventory, and planning-surface checker
durable_residue.promotion trigger: if another evidence JSON surface needs schema backing, reuse #526 helper/scaffold work rather than hand-copying root/bootstrap/schema/inventory boilerplate
